sections.title: New Enemies & Boss
items: Weaver: fast enemy that weaves side-to-side as it closes in
Splinter: breaks into smaller copies when destroyed
Lancer: winds up, then dashes in a straight line - dodge it!
New boss: Aegis Prism, with bolt rings and summoned drones

sections.title: New Look
items: Enemies restyled with a glowing sci-fi holographic look

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Homing shots no longer hover or circle around big targets
Rockets now explode where they actually land
Explosions combine in the correct spot when shots land together
Level-ups offer at most one new weapon at a time
Berserker Rage no longer reappears after you've taken it

sections.title: Balance
items: Life steal healing reduced and capped
Shorter invincibility window after taking a hit
Laser Beam damage greatly increased
Rare, Epic and Legendary upgrades appear more often
Multi-shot can now reach up to 7 projectiles

sections.title: Improvements
items: New shield charge bar under your ship shows when the next shield is ready

sections.title: Improvements
items: Multi-shot bullets now spawn consistently from same position
Spawn offset only applies when smart bullets upgrade is active
Missiles always spread properly (built-in homing)

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed chain lightning not working with single upgrade
Fixed time and score counting during pause/game over
Fixed game continuing to run when paused (enemies, player, shooting)
Fixed smart bullets oscillating with weird movement patterns
Fixed multi-shot bullets overlapping when using smart bullets
Fixed multi-shot missiles overlapping when using homing

sections.title: Improvements
items: Smart bullets upgrade now only appears once (non-stackable)
Multi-shot projectiles now stay visually distinct with homing
Game properly freezes during settings, upgrades, and game over

sections.title: Balance
items: Legendary upgrades much rarer - drop rate reduced from 3% to 1%
Epic upgrades reduced from 12% to 4%
Common upgrades increased from 60% to 75% for steadier progression
Rare upgrades remain at 20%

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed orbital drones and effects continuing during pause
Improved pause handling reliability across all components

sections.title: Architecture
items: Centralized pause handling in base component class
Removed manual pause checks from 15+ files

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed chain lightning effect not triggering on bullet hits

sections.title: Gameplay Fixes
items: Fixed upgrade stacking logic - non-stackable upgrades now properly blocked
Bleed damage now scales with wave progression for better balance

sections.title: Visual Improvements
items: Merged explosion effects show color progression (orange → red → white)
Added merge count indicator rings to show effect intensity
Invincibility aura now pulses with golden glow when active

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed enemy targeting system for complex boss patterns
Improved weapon accuracy and consistency
Temporarily disabled Hydra Boss while fixing spawning issues

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hydra Boss cores now work with all weapon types
Fixed cores not affected by status effects like freeze and bleed
Fixed cores not showing damage numbers

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed enemies sometimes dying twice causing incorrect kill counts
Fixed wave completion detection for splitting bosses
Waves now progress correctly when bosses split into clones

sections.title: Balance Changes
items: Faster wave transitions for better pacing
Combo XP multiplier no longer capped (was 3x max)
Bullet Storm upgrade now gives damage bonus instead of penalty
Smoother player knockback animation

sections.title: UI Improvements
items: Combo meter moved down for better visibility

sections.title: New Features
items: Added surrender option in settings menu
See your predicted global rank before submitting score
Faster and more accurate rank predictions

sections.title: Critical Performance Fixes
items: FIXED: Game crashes at high waves (12GB RAM → 2GB)
Damage numbers now merge together for cleaner display
Much smoother gameplay at Wave 100+
Significantly reduced lag during intense combat

sections.title: Critical Balance Fixes
items: FIXED: Invincibility exploit with armor upgrades
Damage reduction now capped at 60% max
Armor upgrades no longer appear when at cap
Game is now properly challenging at all levels

sections.title: Projectile System
items: Projectile count now capped at 5 max
Projectile upgrades hidden when at cap
Better balance between firepower and performance

sections.title: Critical Fixes
items: FIXED: Wave completion logic (waves no longer complete early)
FIXED: Enemy counting bug (bosses were double-counted)
FIXED: Multi-boss waves now spawn correct number of bosses
FIXED: Pushback flickering replaced with smooth 0.25s animation
REMOVED: Weapon-specific fire rate upgrades (confusing with cooldown)

sections.title: XP System Improvements
items: NEW: Larger XP orbs (50 XP pink, 100 XP red, 250 XP purple)
IMPROVED: More aggressive XP merging reduces orb spam at late levels
NEW: Auto-collect all XP at wave end with animated pull
Better performance and visibility in late game

sections.title: New Features
items: NEW: Enemy spawn indicators at screen edges
Arrows point to off-screen enemies (orange for normal, red for bosses)
Boss indicators show distance in screen units

sections.title: Polish
items: Smooth pushback animation with cubic ease-out
Better debug logging for wave completion tracking
Improved player feedback during combat

sections.title: UI Improvements
items: Standardized fire rate terminology in upgrades
Changed confusing cooldown/charge time to fire rate

sections.title: Critical Fixes
items: FIXED: Kamikaze no longer deals double damage (contact + explosion)
FIXED: Added invulnerability frames (1 sec) to prevent rapid damage
FIXED: Added pushback when hit to prevent getting stuck in enemies
FIXED: Bosses no longer die instantly from player collision
FIXED: Score now displays in HUD (top-right corner)

sections.title: Critical Fixes
items: FIXED: Bullet Storm damage penalty now works correctly
Damage penalty properly applies when you gain extra projectiles

sections.title: Balance
items: Upgrade selections now mix weapons and stats (max 2 weapons)
No longer forced to choose only weapon unlocks

sections.title: Critical Fixes
items: FIXED: Missile upgrades not working (tracking/explosion)
FIXED: Energy Shield upgrade did nothing
FIXED: Spread weapons had inconsistent crit visuals
FIXED: Spread weapons couldn't hit center targets

sections.title: Performance
items: XP drops now merge into higher-tier cores
Reduced XP entity count by up to 96%
Better performance in late game with many kills

sections.title: Balance
items: Powerup drop rate: 15% → 8% (less clutter)
Plasma Spreader: Tighter spread, center bullet
Shotgun: Tighter spread, center pellet
Weapon upgrades only show for equipped weapon

sections.title: UI Improvements
items: Added live score display in HUD (top right)
Renamed 'Homing Missiles' → 'Smart Bullets'
Renamed 'homing strength' → 'tracking power'
Removed confusing weapon prefixes from upgrades

sections.title: Critical Fixes
items: FIXED: Crit chance never worked (was always 0%)
FIXED: Crit damage upgrades now actually apply
All crit-based builds now functional

sections.title: Visual Improvements
items: Thorns damage now shows magenta with THORNS! label
Crit hits show orange glow and larger bullets
Better visual feedback for all damage types

sections.title: Balance
items: Multi Shot: +1 → +2 projectiles (now Rare)
Multi Shot now worth picking over weapon-specific

sections.title: New Weapons
items: Laser Beam (Lv20): Continuous damage beam with rapid fire
Shotgun Blaster (Lv25): 8-pellet spread for close-range devastation
Tesla Coil (Lv30): Chain lightning arcing between enemies

sections.title: System Improvements
items: Weapon unlocks now config-based (easier to add new weapons)
7 total weapons (up from 4)
Weapons unlock at levels: 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30
Better late-game progression and variety

sections.title: Visual Effects
items: New chain lightning effect with energy nodes
Improved beam rendering for laser weapons
Enhanced weapon variety and visual feedback

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed damage reduction/crit caps allowing invincibility
Fixed explosion visual not matching damage area
Thorns now actually reflects damage to attackers

sections.title: Balance
items: Faster progression: XP scaling reduced 1.5x → 1.2x
Faster waves: Delay reduced 2.0s → 1.0s
Railgun buffed: 2.5x → 4.0x damage
Bomb nerfed: 400px → 350px radius, boss damage 25% → 15%

sections.title: New Caps
items: Crit chance: 75% max
Crit damage: 5x max
Damage reduction: 80% max
Orbital drones: 10 max (performance)
